title: Battle Hymn of the Tiger Mother
author: Amy Chua
subline: This is the story of a mother, two daughters, and a piano.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A piano keyboard: 28 white keys + black keys across the top 2/3. ONE key is RED — the one being played. Title is below. -->
  <g transform="translate(80 360)" fill="none">
    <!-- 28 white keys (each 52px wide × 520 tall, 6px gap = total 1624) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <g>
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="58" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="116" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="174" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="232" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="290" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="348" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="406" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="464" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="522" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="580" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="638" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="696" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="754" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="812" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="870" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="928" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="986" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1044" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1102" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1160" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1218" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1276" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1334" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1392" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1450" y="0" width="52" height="520"/><rect x="1508" y="0" width="52" height="520"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Black keys — 7 octaves-ish, skipping the E-F and B-C borders -->
    <g fill="#cccccc" stroke="none">
      <rect x="40" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="98" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="214" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="272" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="330" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="446" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="504" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="562" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="678" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="736" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="794" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="910" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="968" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="1026" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="1142" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="1200" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="1258" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="1374" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="1432" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
      <rect x="1490" y="0" width="28" height="320"/>
    </g>
    <!-- ONE white key is RED — middle, where the 'practicing child' is at this moment -->
    <rect x="754" y="0" width="52" height="520" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- A red hand-finger dot on the red key -->
    <circle cx="780" cy="480" r="18" fill="#0a0a0a"/>
    <circle cx="780" cy="480" r="12" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Piano is Chua's central metaphor — the practice regime, the strict hours, the 'no sleepover, no playdate, no TV' tradeoff. The cover is a piano keyboard: 28 white keys + 20 black keys across the top 2/3. ONE key (middle of the keyboard) is RED, with a red dot on it like a pressed finger. Brand '虎妈' (Tiger Mother in Chinese) anchors the top-left; pill 'STRICT' at the top — the cultural flashpoint. Title sits in 3 stacked lines in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command.
